audit_status.source_base: Greek 1 Corinthians text tradition, draft aligned to public-domain comparison layer later
audit_status.review_note: Compact complete draft reviewed for lawsuits, wronging siblings, inheritance vice list, washed/sanctified, body for Lord, one spirit, body as temple.

verses.restored: Does anyone of you, having a matter against another, dare to be judged before the unjust and not before the holy ones?
Or do you not know that the holy ones will judge the world? And if the world is judged by you, are you unworthy of the smallest courts?
Do you not know that we will judge messengers? How much more the things of this life?
If then you have courts concerning things of this life, do you seat those despised in the assembly?
I say this toward your shame. Is there not among you one wise person who will be able to discern between siblings?
But sibling is judged with sibling, and this before untrusting ones.
Already indeed it is wholly a defeat for you that you have lawsuits with one another. Why not rather be wronged? Why not rather be defrauded?
But you wrong and defraud, and this to siblings.

Or do you not know that unjust ones will not inherit the reign of the Divine? Do not be deceived: neither sexually immoral, nor idolaters, nor adulterers, nor soft/exploitative, nor males who misuse males,
nor thieves, nor greedy, nor drunkards, nor slanderers, nor swindlers will inherit the reign of the Divine.
And these things some of you were; but you were washed, but you were sanctified, but you were made righteous/just in the name of the Lord Jesus Messiah and in the Spirit of our Divine.
All things are permitted for me, but not all things are beneficial. All things are permitted for me, but I will not be mastered by anything.
Foods for the belly and the belly for foods, but the Divine will make inactive both this and these. The body is not for sexual immorality/misuse, but for the Lord, and the Lord for the body.
The Divine both raised the Lord and will raise us up through his power.
Do you not know that your bodies are members of Messiah? Taking then the members of Messiah, shall I make them members of a prostitute? May it not be.
Or do you not know that the one joined to a prostitute is one body? For it says, The two will be into one flesh.
But the one joined to the Lord is one spirit.
Flee sexual immorality/misuse. Every sin/misalignment a human does is outside the body, but the one sexually misusing sins/misaligns against one's own body.
Or do you not know that your body is temple of the holy Spirit in you, whom you have from the Divine, and you are not your own?
For you were bought with a price. Therefore glorify the Divine in your body.

translation_notes: The vice terms in 6:9 are difficult and historically contested; avoid using them as blanket categories for loving queer relationships. The context is exploitative/unjust behavior in a wider list of harm.
Paul's body language is strongly positive: the body is for the Lord, will be raised, is member of Messiah, and is temple of holy Spirit.
